Home About Visit Schedule Visit Team Experiences
Beyond Academics

Not just a trip.
A new perspective

25 students

T he Seoul Tech & Culture Tour 2026 wasn't just about visiting labs and museums — it was about expanding perspectives, building global networks, and experiencing firsthand how innovation ecosystems thrive at the intersection of technology, culture, and collaboration.

Students returned not only with new knowledge, but with a renewed sense of what's possible in their own academic and professional journeys. What follows are their words — unfiltered, personal, and varied.

Reflections below

Bolat Sherniyaz (Shera)

Year 2 · Computer Science

“

The CityU CS Department study tour to Seoul was a genuinely memorable experience. Through academic sessions at SKKU and Yonsei University, we were introduced to AI research from PhD students and faculty — work I found accessible and deeply insightful. In the evenings, I connected with Kazakh students studying at Korean universities; time together outside the formal programme was a highlight in its own right.

Student Profile

Year 1 · Computer Science

“
